name: Merge Bubble Number
description: Merge Bubble Number is a simple and addictive number merge puzzle game. You will control a board of checkers, each with a bubble with a number in it. You need to connect as many bubbles as possible so that bubbles of the same number merge together. The goal of the game is to merge as many bubbles as possible before there are no bubbles that can be synthesized, and finally reach a high score.
instructions: 1 Use the mouse to drag You can also tap the screen to control on mobile devices 2 The game requires you to use mathematical thinking and strategies flexibly and arrange every move reasonably 3 You need to predict the merged numbers and choose the a
